title: Sere Talon
description: Upon pickup, add [blue]2[/blue] random [red]Curses[/red] and [blue]3[/blue] [purple]Wishes[/purple] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Upon pickup, randomly adds 2 Curse cards and 3 Wish cards to your deck. Curse cards are selected from available curses that can be generated by modifiers, ensuring no duplicates in the same pickup effect.
